context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements the marketing budget computation rules including the six line items (paid_search_google, paid_social_meta, amazon_sponsored, email_sms_platform, influencer_content, affiliate), correct rates for each, min/max floor/cap enforcement, seasonal multipliers, and the account code naming convention.

checklist.name: paid_search rate
checklist.description: paid_search_google budget is computed as 8% of website channel revenue (rate=0.08)

checklist.name: paid_social rate
checklist.description: paid_social_meta budget is computed as 12% of website channel revenue (rate=0.12)

checklist.name: amazon_sponsored rate
checklist.description: amazon_sponsored budget is computed as 10% of amazon channel revenue (rate=0.10)

checklist.name: affiliate rate
checklist.description: affiliate budget is computed as 4% of website channel revenue (rate=0.04)

checklist.name: email_sms fixed amount
checklist.description: email_sms_platform budget is a fixed $2,500 per month

checklist.name: influencer base amount
checklist.description: influencer_content base fixed monthly amount is $15,000

checklist.name: influencer seasonal Nov
checklist.description: influencer_content for November applies a 2.0x seasonal multiplier (resulting in $30,000 for the sample Nov output)

checklist.name: paid_search min/max cap
checklist.description: paid_search_google enforces a minimum of $5,000 and maximum of $150,000 per month

checklist.name: paid_social min/max cap
checklist.description: paid_social_meta enforces a minimum of $3,000 and maximum of $200,000 per month

checklist.name: Account code format
checklist.description: Each line item's account_code follows the pattern MKT-{LINE_ITEM_UPPER_WITH_DASHES}, e.g. MKT-PAID-SEARCH-GOOGLE, MKT-EMAIL-SMS-PLATFORM

checklist.name: version field value
checklist.description: Budget rows include a version field set to 'annual_plan' (not a custom name like 'budget_2026')

checklist.name: All six line items present
checklist.description: sample_output.json contains exactly six line items: paid_search_google, paid_social_meta, amazon_sponsored, email_sms_platform, influencer_content, affiliate
